theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop)
    (h₀ : P 0)
    (h₁ : ∀ n, (∀ m < n, P m) → P n) :
  ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n with
  | zero => exact h₀
  | succ n ih =>
    apply h₁
    intro m hm
    apply ih m
    exact Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hm
after_snippet:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h₀ : P 0) (h₁ : ∀ n, (∀ m < n, P m) → P n) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
  | h n ih =>
    apply h₁
    intro m hm
    apply ih m hm
